title.en: Therefore, he will not waste time and continue ...

content.en:
Returning to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, Ye Tian first stabilized the realm, and then immediately thought about the next path of cultivation.

At the level of the emperor level, he has already come to the end, and it is okay to continue to improve, but no matter how much he improves, he can only improve his strength slightly, and there is no essential benefit to himself.

Because the Emperor Supreme Level is already a level that breaks the limits of the universe, it is still the Supreme Level to continue to improve.

Therefore, he will not waste time and continue to stay at the emperor level.

Next, you need to hit the god level!

It is not difficult to become a god-level, with Ye Tian's cultivation talent and potential, he can easily become a god-level, if he uses the standards of the immortal clan, it is an immortal-level.

He needs to transform his body into a true immortal body, his yuan power into immortal power, and his soul into an immortal soul.

Of course, in essence, there is not much difference between the immortal body, the immortal power and the immortal soul and the divine power, the divine body, and the divine soul, but the immortal body is more powerful, just like the divine body of the god race is more powerful than the god body of the general race.

And the god-level body of the demon race is not called a god body, but a demon body.

Due to the physique of each race, the gods of each race are different, and the human race is gradually transformed into the immortal race, and the name may also change in the future.

Ye Tian didn't want to become a god-level directly like this, he wanted to become a special god-level.

At this time, he thought of the Chaos Ancient Tree on Earth.

Now, the Chaos Ancient Tree has successfully transformed, and he can completely use the Chaos Ancient Tree to open up the Chaos Ancient Realm in his body when he hits the god level.

In this way, he will have almost inexhaustible divine power in future battles, and the battle will never dry up, and he can fight forever, which means a lot to him.

Thinking of this, Ye Tian was ready to return to the earth and use the Chaos Ancient Tree on the earth to open up the Chaos Ancient Realm, thus becoming a special god-level.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and the Dark Lord left the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and it didn't take long for them to return to Earth.

......

Kunlun Mountains, underground space.

It's been sealed off by the Dark Master, and no one but him can enter.

At this time, Ye Tian looked at the Chaos Ancient Tree in front of him, revealing a satisfied look.

The Chaos Ancient Tree is very rare, if you encounter it, you will encounter it, and if you can't meet it, you can't create it, even if you don't have the Dark Master, there is no Chaos Ancient Tree.

It can be imagined how lucky Ye Tian was to be able to come across a Chaos Ancient Tree.

"I'm starting to hit the god level, I've been staying at the emperor level for too long!"

Ye Tian couldn't help but sigh.

Thundered!!!

Under the control of Ye Tian's power, the Chaos Ancient Tree slowly broke away from the earth and gradually pulled it up.

When the entire Chaos Ancient Tree broke away from the ground and floated in the air, Ye Tian urged the Dantian World and sent out a suction force.

Swish!!!

The huge Chaos Ancient Tree entered Ye Tian's dantian time and slowly took root in the dantian world.

The first step is complete!

Then, Ye Tian began to attack the god level.

I saw that his body quickly transformed into an immortal body, his yuan power was transformed into an immortal power, and his soul gradually turned into an immortal soul.

Countless immortal lights burst out from Ye Tian's body, illuminating the entire underground space.

At this time, Ye Tian's aura became stronger and stronger, and every second that passed.

When the emperor level becomes a god level, the strength will increase by a hundred times, and the same is true in other aspects, which is equivalent to a hundred times the strength of the entire body.

Ye Tian's original body was very against the sky, and if it grew a hundred times, how terrifying it would be!

Soon.

Ye Tian's body was successfully transformed into an immortal body, and the physique of the chaotic immortal body was officially stimulated.

And the yuan force has also become immortal power, and the soul has become an immortal soul like the real one.

At this moment, Ye Tian officially stepped into the god level.

At the same time, Ye Tian's physical transformation was not over yet.

Dantian World.

Due to Ye Tian's impact on the god level, the dantian world began to expand wildly, and at this moment, Ye Tian urged the power of the Chaos Ancient Tree to instantly freeze the dantian world.

The bigger the world, the better, if it is not stable, no matter how big the world is, it is not as good as the space the size of the palm of your hand.

Ye Tian now fixed the dantian world, and began to use the Chaos Ancient Tree to release the origin of the Chaos Ancient Tree, and fuse with the dantian world, so as to transform the dantian world step by step, so that the dantian world could transform into the chaos ancient world.

Click!!!

The branches of the Chaos Ancient Tree gradually shattered and merged into the dantian world, and the space of the dantian world became more and more stable, and land, mountains, and forests gradually began to appear......

These are the embodiment of the ancient trees of chaos, not the real land, mountains, and forests.

As more and more of the origin of the Chaos Ancient Tree merged into the dantian world, the dantian world underwent a fundamental qualitative change.

I don't know how long it has been, and the entire Chaos Ancient Tree and its origin have completely merged into the dantian world.

The area of the dantian world has not increased much, but it is more stable and powerful than the ordinary god-level dantian world, I don't know how many tens of thousands of times.

Rumble!!!!!

In the center of the Chaos Ancient Realm, a Chaos Ancient Well slowly evolved.

But in the end, the real Chaos Ancient Well did not evolve, only an illusory shadow.

However, if it was with the growth of Ye Tian's cultivation and the evolution of the Chaos Ancient Realm, the Chaos Ancient Well would truly evolve.

The Chaos Ancient Realm was born, and it will continue to absorb the vitality and various energies of the outside world, thus giving birth to a large amount of chaotic energy, which will be stored in the Chaos Ancient Realm, and once the battle is fought, it can be transformed into Ye Tian's immortal power at any time, and can even replenish Ye Tian's physical strength.

It can be said that as long as the energy of the Chaos Ancient Realm is not exhausted, Ye Tian can fight for a long time.

But if you want to exhaust the energy of the Chaos Ancient Realm, it's too difficult!

Ye Tian was about to get up, but suddenly, the Chaos Black Lotus that was sealed on his wrist ran into Ye Tian's Chaos Ancient Realm.

This change completely stunned Ye Tian!

The Chaos Black Lotus was sealed into his body by the Supremes, and it stands to reason that he couldn't move away, but now he broke the seal of the Supremes and ran to the Chaos Ancient Realm.

What does this mean?

"Chaos Black Lotus is probably beyond the concept of the Supremes, and it is even more mysterious and powerful than the Supreme Treasure!"

Ye Tian thought suddenly.

He silently paid attention to the changes in the Chaos Ancient Realm and the Chaos Black Lotus, and he couldn't interfere now, otherwise it would be easy to cause bad changes.

Time passed slowly, and the Chaos Black Lotus gradually took root in the Chaos Ancient Realm as if it had found a home.

Gradually, a lake appeared in the Chaos Ancient Realm, and the Chaos Black Lotus floated quietly in the lake.

With the Chaos Black Lotus taking root in the Chaos Ancient Realm, Ye Tian obviously sensed that the space of the Chaos Ancient Realm was many times more stable, and a barrier had been created that could prevent others from snooping on the Chaos Ancient Realm.

This is a good thing for Ye Tian!

In addition, Ye Tian felt that the Chaos Ancient Realm was growing little by little, and although the speed of growth was very slow, it was indeed growing.

You must know that even in the Chaos Ancient Realm, Ye Tian can only make the Chaos Ancient Realm grow and evolve if he continues to cultivate and break through the realm.

But now, he didn't cultivate, and the Chaos Ancient Realm automatically grew and evolved.

It may not be visible in a day or two, but as time passes, the speed of evolution of the Chaos Ancient Realm is incredible!

"The collateral effect of the Chaos Black Lotus, he has kept my Chaos Ancient Realm in the process of growth and evolution, this effect alone is too terrifying, and it must not be known to others. Ye Tian said darkly.

With a breakthrough in cultivation, Ye Tian no longer stayed in the underground space, flew out of here, and returned to the outside world.

As soon as he returned to the outside world, a cloud appeared in the sky.

Ye Tian's face changed, and he immediately flew out of the earth and came into space.

Thundered!!!!

A thunderstorm has descended!

"Sure enough, I have stepped into the path of defying the sky, and every time I break through a great realm in the future, I will need to go through a thunder tribulation!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Although the god-level thunder tribulation is not very terrifying, it is not weak at all.

There were only three thunder tribulations this time, but each one was many times more terrifying than the last thunder tribulation on Supreme Mountain.

However, Ye Tian's strength was far beyond before, and he was not very afraid of these three thunder tribulations.

Rumble!!!

The first thunderstorm has come!

Ye Tian split it with a knife, and the remnants of the thunder tribulation bombarded Ye Tian's body, only causing Ye Tian to be slightly injured.

Then, the second and third thunder tribulations came one by one, and Ye Tian went all out and successfully survived, but the injuries on his body were even more serious.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged too quickly and began to rest and heal.

A few hours later, Ye Tian's injuries had basically recovered.

"Congratulations to Your Highness for breaking through to the god level!"

The Lord of Darkness appeared, congratulating.

But the next moment, his expression changed slightly.

As the master, the god-level should not have any secrets in front of him, and even the soul space will definitely not be able to hide it from him.

But now, he couldn't get a glimpse of Ye Tian's dantian world.

He knew that Ye Tian was using the Chaos Ancient Realm to open up the Chaos Ancient Realm, but even the Chaos Ancient Realm couldn't hide his prying eyes.

He didn't ask, after all, this involved Ye Tian's secret, and if he asked rashly, it would definitely make Ye Tian uncomfortable.

Although he is now one of the high-ranking members of the human race, he is also Ye Tian's bodyguard, and he must not exceed his duties.

"Dark Master, I'll retreat and cultivate for a period of time first, and then upgrade my cultivation to the ninth order of the god level as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian said.

"That's right, Your Highness really needs to upgrade your cultivation to the ninth order of the god level as soon as possible, otherwise it will affect the combat power of Your Highness's invincible-level Eternal Rank His Highness!" the Lord of Darkness nodded.

He didn't know that Ye Tian had already become a supreme level, so he said so.

Ye Tian didn't explain either, the less people knew about him becoming a Supreme Highness, the better.

However, he had just become a god-level, and his current cultivation was only a god-level first-order, and his combat strength was not a god-level supreme-level highness, but Ye Tian believed that it would not take long for him to return to his god-level supreme-level highness.

Back in the Heavenly Pavilion, Ye Tian turned on the 300-fold time acceleration.

After his time talent was raised to the god level, his time acceleration ability increased to 300 times.

What is the probability of 300 times time acceleration, Ye Tian's cultivation speed has increased by 300 times compared to the same level, and this is not counting the increase in other aspects.

Under the 300 times time acceleration cultivation, coupled with Ye Tian's supreme cultivation talent, even under the suppression of the universe, his cultivation speed reached a terrifying level.

A few months after the real world, Ye Tian was out of the customs.

At this time, his cultivation had already reached the level of the ninth order of the god level.

However, his current cultivation is not stable, and he has not gone through god-level battles, and his cultivation has not been transformed into combat effectiveness for a while.

Therefore, for a long time in the future, Ye Tian's cultivation will basically maintain this level and will not impact the true god level.

In the years that followed.

Ye Tian basically stayed on the earth, and often let his god-level guards compete with him.

It can be said that with Ye Tian's current combat strength, there are almost not many true god-level opponents for him, and even the great god-level guards can only be worthy of a tie with Ye Tian.

You must know that to be able to become his guards, those great god-level are also very powerful among the same level.

It can only be said that Ye Tian is too powerful, once Ye Tian becomes the peak of the true god level, it is even enough to fight with some galaxy-level powerhouses.
